# unloadComposition()

**Instance Method**

Unloads the composition from the view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func unloadComposition()
```

## Discussion

If necessary, this method calls [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCView/stopRendering()]  prior to unloading the composition.

## Loading a Composition

- **loadComposition(fromFile:)**: Loads the composition file located at the specified path.
- **load(_:)**: Loads a [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCComposition] object into the view.
- **loadedComposition()**: Returns the composition loaded in the view.
